def solve(grid : Array(Array(Int64)), k : Int64) : Int64
  m = grid.size
  n = grid[0].size
  visited = Array.new(m) { Array.new(n, false) }
  count = 0

  for i in 0...m
    for j in 0...n
      if grid[i][j] > 0 && !visited[i][j]
        queue = Deque.new
        queue << [i, j]
        visited[i][j] = true
        sum_island = 0

        while queue.not_empty?
          x, y = queue.pop_front
          sum_island += grid[x][y]
          [(-1, 0), (1, 0), (0, -1), (0, 1)].each do |dx, dy|
            nx = x + dx
            ny = y + dy
            if nx >= 0 && nx < m && ny >= 0 && ny < n && !visited[nx][ny] && grid[nx][ny] > 0

              queue << [nx, ny]
            end
          end
        end

        if sum_island % k == 0
          count += 1
        end
      end
    end
  end

  count
end
```
